audit_tracks.name: Agents, identities, capabilities, ART and CRT
KAP protocols, registries, runs and adapters
Interfaces, YOS Shell, cockpit, browser, mobile and voice
Y-WORLD knowledge domain and Obsidian assets
Source corpus, logs, migrations and archives
Canonical topology and registry patch plan
Final coverage proof and residual unknowns

confirmed_findings.finding: Root README and several 00_META maps describe the pre-reorganization topology and are stale relative to the current backbone.
AGENTS and YARP are first-class backbone modules in implemented candidate architectures but are absent from YOS-MODULE-REGISTRY v1.0 and the older repo map.
ART and CRT are routing submodules of AGENTS/04_ROUTING, not standalone backbone modules.
File-count claims conflict: root README says 915, pre-reorg inventory says 940; a fresh authoritative census is required.
KAP source registries contain substantial prior metadata assimilation, but the current YOS monorepo itself has not yet been fully registered and semantically classified as a source instance.
The KAP adapter census is useful but contains environment-specific status from Manus in July 2026 and must not be treated as timeless capability truth.

next_batch: YOS Shell and Manus interface lineage
completion_rule: Do not mark COMPLETE until every tracked top-level domain has an evidence-backed inventory, semantic classification, lineage decision, and explicit residual-unknown list.
